# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
#  Geometric Studio — robots.txt
#  https://geometricstudio.com
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Disallow non-content paths
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_next/
Disallow: /node_modules/

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://geometric-studios.com/sitemap.xml

# Crawl-delay (be gentle on the server)
Crawl-delay: 1

# ── Major crawlers ────────────────────────────────
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Twitterbot
Allow: /

User-agent: facebookexternalhit
Allow: /

User-agent: LinkedInBot
Allow: /
